steps.title: Close the parenthesis
steps.content: The sentence opens a parenthetical definition after the word cinch. The blank must complete the definition a belt and then close the parenthesis before the main sentence continues with comes from cincho.

steps.title: Complete the main sentence
steps.content: A leaves the parenthesis open and inserts a semicolon inside it. C leaves the parenthesis open with a dash. D leaves the parenthesis open with a comma. The only grammatical option closes the parenthetical definition cleanly. The answer is B.
